steps.title: Translate the height
steps.content:
The variable $y$ represents the truck's height. The height is $64$ inches, so:
$$y=64$$

steps.title: Translate the length
steps.content:
The variable $x$ represents the truck's length. The length is $4$ times the height, so:
$$x=4y$$

steps.title: Match the system
steps.content: The system must include $x=4y$ and $y=64$. The answer is D.
